creator: jlemon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


This is arguably the correct behavior.  ti/te are supposed to be the 
startup/ending sequences for any program that uses termcap.  The fix 
for this problem would be to use the '-e' flag for more.  It could be 
argued that -e should be the default, but that breaks it for those of 
us who don't have a 'clear screen' sequence in 'te'.
